news-global-econ.title: NBA's new lottery system strips worst teams of top draft odds, but may reward calculated mediocrity
news-global-econ.description: The NBA Board of Governors approved a dramatic draft lottery reform designed to combat tanking, but the new system may simply redirect the incentives.

news-global-econ.title: Putin lands $16.5B nuclear win on Russia’s doorstep in massive Kazakhstan pact: reports
news-global-econ.description: Putin and Tokayev signed a landmark $16.5 billion nuclear power plant deal, marking Russia's geopolitical victory in Central Asia, reports say.

news-global-econ.title: Google Engineer Charged After Making $1 Million on Insider Trading
news-global-econ.description:
A Google engineer made more than $1 million using inside information to place Polymarket bets based on what users were for searching on Google.
The post Google Engineer Charged After Making $1 Million on Insider Trading appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Socialist Zohran Mamdani launches Elon Musk-style ‘COGE’ chaired by Soros-aligned Dem
news-global-econ.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani takes a page from Elon Musk's DOGE playbook by launching his own city Commission on Government Efficiency.

news-global-econ.title: WATCH: Dem senator says Platner's struggles speak to ‘regular people’ amid backlash over resurfaced posts
news-global-econ.description: Sen. Chris Murphy defends support for Maine Democrat Graham Platner, saying voters resonate with his message despite controversial Reddit posts.

news-korea-soc.title: North Korea Says It Successfully Tested AI-Guided Missile
news-korea-soc.description:
The flagship government propaganda outlet in North Korea announced on Wednesday that communist dictator Kim Jong-un had presided over a successful test of a “tactical cruise missile” relying on artificial intelligence (AI).

news-global-soc.title: FBI seizes record-setting $8 billion in cryptocurrency amid intercontinental 'scam compound' crackdown
news-global-soc.description: The FBI seized a record $8 billion in cryptocurrency and arrested hundreds in Operation Blackout, a crackdown on intercontinental scam compounds.

news-global-soc.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Chatbots' left-wing bias
news-global-soc.description: The Fox News AI Newsletter gives readers the latest AI technology advancements, covering the challenges and opportunities AI presents.

news-global-soc.title: Iran Demands U.N. Stop American Military Attacking Its Drones After Claiming to Strike U.S. Air Base
news-global-soc.description:
The Iranian Foreign Ministry demanded on Thursday that the United Nations Security Council act to contain the United States in response to limited action against its attack drones, which Tehran claimed to respond to by bombing a U.S. air base.
